title: crun bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.23.1-1]
- update to https://github.com/containers/crun/releases/tag/1.23.1
- fixes 'Bump crun to 1.23.1 in RHEL 10.0'
- Resolves: RHEL-110663
full_text:
